events.name: F✦FOREVER concert residency
events.rationale: Three consecutive Indoor Stadium nights draw regional young-adult fans for weekend stays; smaller venue than National Stadium so compression is real but limited.

events.name: Singapore IP Week 2026
events.venue: Sands Expo & Convention Centre, Marina Bay Sands
events.attendees: ~2,000-3,000 international IP professionals, officials and delegates
events.rationale: Government-backed IPOS conference with international senior professional attendance staying 2-3 nights near CBD; modest absolute room-night volume but ideal adults-only overnight profile. Fills a late-August window.

events.name: BEX Asia 2026 (Built Environment trade show)
events.venue: Sands Expo & Convention Centre, Marina Bay Sands
events.attendees: ~10,000, mix of regional delegates and local day-attendees
events.rationale: 3-day trade show with meaningful regional overnight component, but significant local day-attendee share dilutes room-night impact; past editions produced modest, not heavy, compression.

events.name: Submarine Networks World 2026
events.venue: Sands Expo & Convention Centre, Marina Bay Sands
events.rationale: Small but almost entirely international senior-exec crowd staying 2-3 nights; modest absolute room-night volume caps it at Moderate despite ideal attendee type.

events.name: Post Malone - BIG ASS Stadium World Tour
events.rationale: Single-night stadium show on a Friday; only SEA stop draws Malaysia/Indonesia flyers who stay 1-2 nights. Adult demographic fits adults-only properties.

events.name: The Weeknd - After Hours Til Dawn Tour (2 nights)
events.attendees: ~55,000/night, strong regional inbound (SEA fans fly in)
events.rationale: Two-night stadium act; comparable stadium concerts (Coldplay, Taylor Swift 2024) materialized into citywide occupancy spikes. Adult audience staying overnight. ITZY at Indoor Stadium Oct 3 stacks the same weekend.

events.name: ITZY World Tour
events.rationale: Mid-size K-pop show, but stacks on The Weeknd's Oct 2-3 stadium weekend - combined citywide effect makes that weekend a hold-rates window.

events.name: TOKEN2049 Singapore 2026 (+ TOKEN2049 Week side events)
events.rationale: One of the CBD's biggest compression events: 25,000+ high-spend international adults plus a week of side events/parties across Chinatown, Quays and Marina Bay. Directly precedes the F1 weekend (Oct 9-11), creating a continuous Oct 7-11 sell-out block - the single strongest hold-and-raise window of the quarter. Historically fills boutique/aparthotel inventory citywide.

events.name: F1 Singapore Grand Prix 2026 (night race + trackside concerts)
events.attendees: ~260,000 over race weekend, heavily international adults
events.rationale: Strongest annual compression event for CBD; Oct 2025 race weekend drove citywide occupancy to 95.9% and record ADR (~SGD 384). First Sprint-format Singapore GP adds Friday demand. International overnight adults - ideal Heritage Collection profile. Back-to-back with TOKEN2049.

events.name: Stray Kids World Tour
events.rationale: K-pop stadium acts reliably fill budget/boutique CBD rooms with young-adult regional travelers staying the weekend; past K-pop stadium dates materialized into occupancy.

events.name: ITB Asia 2026 (Asia's largest B2B travel trade show)
events.venue: Sands Expo & Convention Centre, Marina Bay Sands
events.rationale: Multi-day international corporate delegates staying 3-4 nights near CBD; trade buyers routinely book boutique/aparthotel product. Consistent year-on-year occupancy materialization.

events.name: Singapore International Energy Week 2026
events.venue: Sands Expo & Convention Centre, Marina Bay Sands
events.attendees: ~15,000+ international energy executives and delegates from 100+ countries
events.rationale: Week-long government-backed conference with international senior-executive attendance; multi-night CBD stays. Just past the 3-month window but included for forward pricing visibility.
